title: dodonaea hackettiana
intro: Dodonaea hackettiana, also known as the Australian hop bush, is a native Australian plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dodonaea hackettiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Dodonaea hackettiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
